summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GitStack SaaS platform. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% working with all major features operational including AI integrations.

ui_bugs.issue: Collections page shows 0 collections despite API returning 6 collections

design_issues.issue: Multiple React key warnings for duplicate keys in topic and tool lists
